Home / About

Winsome

Local production, calm design and reliable execution

Our Approach

Winsome creates practical, calm and precisely tailored solutions for modern spaces.

We work so that the product isn't just visually appealing — it genuinely simplifies everyday use, fits the interior and maintains quality for a long time.

Approach

What we do, how we work and why Winsome

What We Do

  • We create blind and insect screen solutions for residential and commercial spaces.
  • We select products based on window shape, lighting, privacy and daily usage.
  • We work so that the final result is clean, practical and naturally blended with the interior.

How We Work

  • Every project starts with a space assessment and recommendation tailored to real needs.
  • Measurements and details are finalized in advance so everything runs smoothly at the installation stage.
  • Communication is brief, clear and timely — from consultation to the finished result.

Why Winsome

  • A local approach gives us more flexibility in sizes, timelines and individual requirements.
  • We pay attention to visual calm as well as material durability and ease of maintenance.
  • Our goal is a product that doesn't just look good, but genuinely simplifies everyday life for the customer.

Values

Quality, practicality and custom fit

Attention to detail

A careful, precise approach from consultation through final installation.

Practical aesthetics

Products are chosen for visual calm as well as light, air, privacy, and protection.

Flexible customization

Fabric, color, mechanism, profile, and size are chosen for the specific project—not a one-size standard scheme.

Ready to refresh your space?

Get in touch and we will help you choose the right blinds, roller shades, or insect screen system for your windows and doors.

Request a consultation

Winsome creates calm, practical, precisely fitted solutions for homes, offices, and commercial spaces.

65 Kakheti Hwy, Tbilisi

  • Roller blinds
  • Zebra blinds
  • Roman blinds
  • Venetian blinds
  • Vertical blinds
  • Horizontal blinds
  • Pleated insect screen
  • Frame-mounted insect screens
